3292500.name: Anathema's Symphony
3292500.description:
Anathema's Symphony is a top-down rhythm-shooter that forces you to move, shoot, and dodge to the beat. It combines rhythm-based combat with modern 3D graphics and a world full of lore waiting to be explored.

Gameplay Features:

• Rhythm-Driven Combat: In Anathema's Symphony, every action is tied to the beat. Both the enemy and player attacks are synched to the rhythm, which often times changes, for more unpredictability and a greater challenge!

• Vertical Complexity Mechanics: As you progress, Anathema's Symphony ramps up the challenge—not by offering upgrades for your character, but by demanding tighter timings and better movement. Each level is tuned to be a greater challenge than the last.

• Genre-Bending Experience: Blending the top down dodging with rhythm driven combat offers a largely unexplored take on the genre that will for sure freshen up your experience.

Get ready to enter a world where rhythm and skill rule. With unique 3D visuals, challenging mechanics, and a musical flow that controls everything, Anathema's Symphony offers a rhythm-shooter experience unlike any other. Are you ready?
